---
title: "Main Integrated Financial Report"
author: "Roan Campo, Denzel Macayan, Bea Uy, Miguel Uy"
date: "2026-07-01"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
---
To run, use the `knit` button shown above in the ribbon. The purpose of this `Main.rmd` is to atomize the sections to parts. This will create

You can run the child `.rmd` files in order in the same r session to get the output. Remember, for long outputs, you can hide them in RStudio.

```{r global-setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r set-environment-dependencies}
required_packages <- c(
  "tidyr", "dplyr", "tibble", "purrr", "moments", "quantmod", "reticulate", "httr", "jsonlite", "xts", "readr","stringr"
)

missing_packages <- required_packages[!sapply(required_packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]

if (length(missing_packages) > 0) {
  cat("Installing missing dependencies:", paste(missing_packages, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  install.packages(missing_packages)
}

invisible(lapply(required_packages, library, character.only = TRUE))

eodhdR2::set_token("6a4d1a69783631.62359123")
```

```{r child-01-data-acquisition, echo=TRUE, child='01_data_acquisition_cleaning.rmd'}
```

```{r fetch-pse-data}
pal_raw <- read_csv("pal_stock.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) 

pal_df <- pal_raw %>%
  mutate(Date = as.Date(Date, format = "%m/%d/%Y")) %>%
  
  filter(!is.na(Date)) %>%
  
  arrange(Date) %>%
  
  mutate(
    `Vol.` = case_when(
      str_detect(`Vol.`, "K") ~ as.numeric(str_remove(`Vol.`, "K")) * 1000,
      str_detect(`Vol.`, "M") ~ as.numeric(str_remove(`Vol.`, "M")) * 1000000,
      `Vol.` == "-" ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ as.numeric(`Vol.`)
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Date, Open, High, Low, Price, `Vol.`) %>% 
  rename(Close = Price, Volume = `Vol.`) %>%
  
  mutate(AdjClose = Close) 

pal_xts <- xts(pal_df[, -1], order.by = pal_df$Date)

colnames(pal_xts) <- c("PAL.Open", "PAL.High", "PAL.Low", "PAL.Close", "PAL.Volume", "PAL.Adjusted")

PAL <- pal_xts["2019-12/2025-12"]
```

```{r load-yahoo}
yahoo_tickers <- c(
  US_Equity = "UAL",     # US Equity: United Airlines
  Bitcoin = "BTC-USD",   # Bitcoin in USD
  SPY = "SPY",           # SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust
  VIX = "^VIX"           # CBOE Volatility Index
)

getSymbols(yahoo_tickers, src = "yahoo", from = start_date, to = end_date)
```


```{r load-fred}
fred_tickers <- c(
  "DGS10",
  "FEDFUNDS",
  "CPIAUCSL"
)

getSymbols(fred_tickers, src = "FRED")

DGS10 <- window(DGS10, start = start_date, end = end_date)
FEDFUNDS <- window(FEDFUNDS, start = start_date, end = end_date)
CPIAUCSL <- window(CPIAUCSL, start = start_date, end = end_date)
```
```{r init-obs}
instruments <- c("UAL", "PAL", "BTC-USD", "SPY", "VIX", "DGS10", "FEDFUNDS", "CPIAUCSL")
init_obs <- function(ticker_list, sample_size = 3){
   for (sym in ticker_list) {
    data_obj <- get(sym)
    cat("INSTRUMENT:", sym, "\n")
    
    print(head(data_obj))
    cat("\n")
    
    na_indices <- which(rowSums(is.na(data_obj)) > 0)
    missing_count <- length(na_indices)
    
    cat("Total NAs:", missing_count, "\n\n")
    if (missing_count > 0) {
      for (idx in head(na_indices, sample_size)) {
        start_idx <- max(1, idx - 1)
        end_idx <- min(nrow(data_obj), idx + 1)
        print(data_obj[start_idx:end_idx, ])
        cat("------\n")
      }
      cat("\n")
    }
    
    dup_indices <- which(duplicated(zoo::index(data_obj)))
    dup_count <- length(dup_indices)
    cat("Total Duplicates:", dup_count, "\n\n")
    
    if (dup_count > 0) {
      for (idx in head(dup_indices, sample_size)) {
        start_idx <- max(1, idx - 1)
        end_idx <- min(nrow(data_obj), idx + 1)
        
        print(data_obj[start_idx:end_idx, ])
        cat("------\n")
      }
      cat("\n")
    }
  } 
}
init_obs(instruments)
```

```{r fix-local-na}
for (sym in instruments) {
  temp_data <- get(sym)
  temp_data <- na.locf(temp_data)
  assign(sym, temp_data)
}
```

```{r check-local-na-fix}
init_obs(instruments)
```

```{r convert-to-df}
df_list <- map(instruments, function(sym) {
  data_obj <- get(sym)
  
  # If it has an Adjusted column, extract it. Otherwise, use the raw data object.
  if (has.Ad(data_obj)) {
    extracted_data <- Ad(data_obj)
  } else {
    extracted_data <- data_obj
  }
  
  clean_df <- as.data.frame(extracted_data) %>% 
    rownames_to_column(var = "Date") %>% 
    mutate(Date = as.Date(Date)) %>%
    as_tibble()
  
  return(clean_df)
})

master_df <- df_list %>% 
  compact() %>%
  reduce(full_join, by = "Date") %>% 
  arrange(Date) %>% 
  fill(-Date, .direction = "down")
```

```{r log-returns}
master_df <- master_df %>%
  mutate(across(
    -Date, 
    ~ c(NA, diff(log(.x)))
  )) %>%
  rename_with(~ str_replace(.x, "\\.Adjusted$", ".LogAdj"), -Date)
```

```{r explore-master-df}
explore_instruments <- function(instruments, master_df) {
  for (sym in instruments) {
    cat("INSTRUMENT:", sym, "\n")
    
    instrument_df <- master_df %>% 
      select(Date, starts_with(sym))
    
    print(instrument_df, n = 6)
    cat("\n")
    
    cat("--- Missing Values per Column ---\n")
    instrument_df %>% 
      summarise(across(everything(), ~sum(is.na(.)))) %>% 
      print(width = Inf)
    cat("\n")
    
    missing_rows <- instrument_df %>%
      filter(if_any(starts_with(sym), is.na))
    
    total_missing <- nrow(missing_rows)
    cat("Total Rows with NAs:", total_missing, "\n")
    
    if (total_missing > 0) {
      cat("--- Top 10 Missing Rows ---\n")
      print(missing_rows, n = 10)
    }
    
    dup_count <- sum(duplicated(instrument_df$Date))
  }
  
  dplyr::glimpse(master_df)
}
explore_instruments(instruments, master_df)
```

```{r fix-missing-master-df}
master_df <- master_df %>%
  fill(-Date, .direction = "down") %>%
  filter(Date >= as.Date("2020-01-01"))

explore_instruments(instruments, master_df)
```

```{r function-descriptive-statistics}
get_summary_stats <- function(df, target_cols, frequency = "overall") {
  
  base_df <- df %>%
    select(Date, all_of(target_cols)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -Date, names_to = "Instrument", values_to = "Value") %>%
    mutate(
      Period = if (frequency == "yearly") {
        format(Date, "%Y")
      } else if (frequency == "quarterly") {
        paste0(format(Date, "%Y"), "-", quarters(Date))
      } else if (frequency == "monthly") {
        format(Date, "%Y-%m")
      } else if (frequency == "seasonal_quarter") {
        quarters(Date)
      } else if (frequency == "seasonal_month") {
        format(Date, "%m")
      } else {
        "Overall"
      }
    ) %>%
    group_by(Instrument, Period)
  
  summary_stats <- base_df %>%
    summarise(
      Mean = mean(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Median = median(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Sum = sum(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Variance = var(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Std_Dev = sd(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Min = min(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Max = max(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      Range = Max - Min,
      Skewness = skewness(Value, na.rm = TRUE), 
      Kurtosis = kurtosis(Value, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 2)))
  
  if (frequency != "overall") {
    summary_stats <- summary_stats %>%
      pivot_wider(
        names_from = Instrument,
        values_from = c(Mean, Median, Variance, Std_Dev, Min, Max, Range, Skewness, Kurtosis),
        names_glue = "{Instrument}_{.value}"
      ) %>%
      arrange(Period)
  }
  
  return(summary_stats)
}

target_cols <- c(
  "UAL.LogAdj", 
  "PAL.LogAdj", 
  "BTC-USD.LogAdj", 
  "SPY.LogAdj", 
  "VIX.LogAdj", 
  "DGS10", 
  "FEDFUNDS", 
  "CPIAUCSL"
)

print(get_summary_stats(master_df, target_cols, frequency = "overall"))
```

```{r descriptive-statistics-yearly}
print(get_summary_stats(master_df, target_cols, "yearly"))
```
```{r descriptive-statistics-quarterly}
print(get_summary_stats(master_df, target_cols, "quarterly"))
```
```{r descriptive-statistics-monthly}
print(get_summary_stats(master_df, target_cols, "monthly"))
```

```{r descriptive-statistics-seasonal_quarter}
print(get_summary_stats(master_df, target_cols, "seasonal_quarter"))
```

```{r descriptive-statistics-seasonal_monthly}
print(get_summary_stats(master_df, target_cols, "seasonal_month"))
```
